60	TCGA-13-1411	TCGA-10-0938	TCGA-29-2425	TCGA-23-1023	TCGA-13-0724	TCGA-13-1495	TCGA-24-1924	TCGA-24-1604	TCGA-24-1849	TCGA-24-2293	TCGA-25-1633	TCGA-23-1026	TCGA-13-0924	TCGA-23-1032	TCGA-24-1565	TCGA-25-1625	TCGA-29-1781	TCGA-09-1669	TCGA-25-1324	TCGA-61-1911	TCGA-24-1555	TCGA-57-1993	TCGA-30-1718	TCGA-61-2008	TCGA-30-1862	TCGA-29-1698	TCGA-61-1737	TCGA-59-2352	TCGA-24-2262	TCGA-25-1632	TCGA-24-2261	TCGA-61-2102	TCGA-61-1740	TCGA-24-1470	TCGA-29-1699	TCGA-61-2101	TCGA-29-1768	TCGA-24-1436	TCGA-57-1583	TCGA-24-1923	TCGA-61-2111	TCGA-24-2023	TCGA-24-1846	TCGA-29-1693	TCGA-25-1320	TCGA-10-0928	TCGA-5X-AA5U	TCGA-13-0795	TCGA-29-1711	TCGA-25-1627	TCGA-24-1560	TCGA-04-1542	TCGA-04-1338	TCGA-24-2289	TCGA-24-2254	TCGA-20-0987	TCGA-24-1845	TCGA-09-1673	TCGA-29-1697	TCGA-04-1648	TCGA-29-1778	TCGA-61-2003	TCGA-04-1347	TCGA-13-1511	TCGA-24-1562	TCGA-24-1416	TCGA-29-1705	TCGA-59-2348	TCGA-09-2054	TCGA-13-0797	TCGA-04-1356	TCGA-24-1850	TCGA-61-1900	TCGA-29-1703	TCGA-57-1585	TCGA-23-1111	TCGA-04-1341	TCGA-25-1312	TCGA-04-1331	TCGA-23-1021	TCGA-36-1578	TCGA-23-1116	TCGA-61-2097	TCGA-59-2351	TCGA-36-1577	TCGA-36-1568	TCGA-13-1487	TCGA-29-1783	TCGA-13-0899	TCGA-23-1120	TCGA-13-1408	TCGA-13-0920	TCGA-04-1357	TCGA-25-1635	TCGA-29-1776	TCGA-13-1498	TCGA-29-1785	TCGA-29-1701	TCGA-04-1332	TCGA-23-1113	TCGA-30-1860	TCGA-09-0364	TCGA-13-1501	TCGA-10-0933	TCGA-61-2009	TCGA-24-2281	TCGA-36-1581	TCGA-59-2350	TCGA-09-2045	TCGA-61-1910	TCGA-24-1546	TCGA-24-1552	TCGA-36-1576	TCGA-09-1666	TCGA-25-1323	TCGA-57-1586	TCGA-13-0720	TCGA-36-1570	TCGA-24-1557	TCGA-29-1769	TCGA-29-2414	TCGA-24-1431	TCGA-59-2363	TCGA-25-1314	TCGA-61-1733	TCGA-13-0908	TCGA-13-0804	TCGA-3P-A9WA	TCGA-29-1784	TCGA-30-1866	TCGA-13-1488	TCGA-23-1114	TCGA-23-1109	TCGA-13-1481	TCGA-09-2044	TCGA-13-0799	TCGA-29-1770	TCGA-24-0979	TCGA-13-0768	TCGA-13-0884	TCGA-13-0901	TCGA-13-0890	TCGA-04-1343	TCGA-25-1631	TCGA-23-2081	TCGA-24-1425	TCGA-61-2095	TCGA-09-1659	TCGA-24-2298	TCGA-13-0919	TCGA-25-2393	TCGA-61-1741	TCGA-13-0885	TCGA-61-
